summary: Pricing page frontend testing completed successfully. All 15 test cases passed for /en/pricing and /fr/pricing routes.
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing.js is well-structured with clean content object separation for EN/FR
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Responsive CSS properly handles mobile (1 column) and tablet (3 columns) layouts
test_credentials: N/A - pricing page is public, no auth required
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing page fully tested. Routes /pricing, /en/pricing, /fr/pricing all work correctly. Toggle switches prices instantly. All 7 sections render in correct order. French and English content properly separated.

tests_passed: All 5 pricing cards render (free, paypercase, solo, family, pro)
VS Old World comparison columns render correctly
Solo card has 'LE PLUS POPULAIRE' badge
No English text on French page (except brand names)
Toggle switches prices instantly (no page reload)
Toggle works on mobile and tablet viewports
/dashboard redirects to login for unauthenticated users
